query: INSERT INTO manifestations (work_id, format, file_path, ingestion_file_hash, current_file_hash, file_size_bytes, ingestion_status, validation_status, created_at) VALUES ($1, 'epub'::manifestation_format, $2, $3, $3, 1000, 'complete'::ingestion_status, 'valid'::validation_status, $4) RETURNING id
